title: Free Up Storage Space
summary: Free up space on a phone or computer by removing unneeded files and apps.
learnerPromise: You will be able to check how much storage is left and remove items you no longer need.
whyItMatters: Running out of storage can slow down your device and prevent you from taking photos or installing updates. Keeping space free helps your device run more smoothly.
realLifeUses: Your phone says 'Storage Full' when you try to take a photo
An app update cannot install because there is not enough space
Your computer is running slower than usual
You want to download a new app or game but need to make room first
materialsNeeded: Optional: cloud storage account for files you want to keep
result: At least 1 GB of freed storage space and a list of what was removed or moved.
youWillLearn: How to check current storage usage on your device
How to find the largest files or apps taking up space
How to safely delete or offload apps you no longer use
How to clear cached data and downloads you no longer need
miniChallenge: Check your device's storage and delete or remove enough items to free up at least 500 MB.
steps: Open your device settings and find the storage or memory section
Review what is using the most space — usually apps, photos, videos, or downloads
Delete apps you have not used in the past month or offload them if that option is available
Remove blurry photos, duplicate screenshots, and downloaded files you no longer need
Empty the trash or recently deleted folder to fully free the space
completionCriteria: You have freed at least 500 MB of storage
You can see the updated storage amount in your device settings
commonProblems: Deleted items sitting in a 'Recently Deleted' folder still take up space
Not knowing which apps are the largest — look for a list sorted by size in settings
Feeling unsure about deleting an app — you can usually re-download it later for free
tips: Start with downloads and screenshots — these are usually safe to delete
Use built-in tools like 'Offload Unused Apps' on iPhone or 'Storage Sense' on Windows
Move photos and videos to cloud storage before deleting them from your device
Set a monthly reminder to clean up storage before it becomes a problem
